ops.note: Shipped as cc-steer 43bc13de, CI 4/4 green. HttpDrafter (cc_steer/watcher/drafter_http.py) satisfies the exact cascade Protocol; selected only by explicit --drafter http + --drafter-endpoint (auto still resolves mlx-or-spawn — pinned by test_auto_selects_mlx_over_http_when_a_watcher_is_promoted); explicit timeout on every request (connect/read/write/pool, asserted end-to-end); endpoint-down, read-timeout, non-2xx, and malformed payloads all fail open to Draft(NO_STEER) with a visible stderr line through a narrow except (httpx.HTTPError, json.JSONDecodeError, DrafterResponseError) — real bugs still propagate. Review caught + fixed a confirmed blocker pre-ship: scoring read the <think> scaffold position, not the sentinel (fixed by teacher-forced prefill w/ continue_final_message, request shape pinned in tests). API key env-only (CC_STEER_DRAFTER_API_KEY). Substrate-specific threshold calibration deliberately deferred to phase 3.
